title: Reliance Foundation Undergraduate Scholarship
amount_description: Up to INR 2 Lakhs over the duration of the degree
description: Supports meritorious students from all fields of study for undergraduate courses in India.

title: Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 80% of tuition fees or INR 20,000
description: Supports students studying in Class 11, 12, or pursuing general graduation/professional courses.

title: Kotak Kanya Scholarship
description: Provides financial assistance to meritorious girl students from underprivileged families for professional graduation courses.

title: HDFC Bank Parivartan's ECS Scholarship
amount_description: Up to INR 75,000 based on course level
description: Supports students from underprivileged backgrounds studying in school or pursuing graduation/post-graduation.

title: SBI Asha Scholarship
description: Supports class 6 to 12 students from economically weaker sections.

title: LIC Golden Jubilee Scholarship
amount_description: INR 20,000 per annum for professional courses
description: Supports meritorious students from economically weaker families for higher studies in medicine, engineering, or graduation.

title: ONGC Merit Scholarship
description: Supports SC/ST and OBC students pursuing professional courses like Engineering, MBA, MBBS.

title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: Scheme to promote technical education for girl children.

title: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
amount_description: INR 50,000 per annum for professional courses
description: Supports specially-abled students pursuing technical education.

title: AICTE PG Scholarship
amount_description: INR 12,400 per month for GATE/GPAT qualified students
description: Offered to GATE/GPAT qualified students admitted in AICTE approved M.Tech/M.Pharm courses.

title: NSP Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship
amount_description: INR 10,000 per year for 3 years, INR 20,000 for PG
description: Supports college and university students from families below a certain income threshold.

title: Karnataka SSP Post-Matric Scholarship
amount_description: Varies from INR 5,000 to INR 25,000 depending on course
description: State scholarship for post-matric students of Karnataka belonging to SC/ST/OBC/Minority categories.

title: National Fellowship for OBC
provider: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Provides financial assistance to OBC students for pursuing higher education leading to M.Phil/Ph.D degrees.

title: Adobe Women-in-Technology Scholarship
amount_description: Up to $20,000 USD or equivalent INR
description: Empowers women in technology and engineering careers. Covers tuition and fees.

title: L'Oréal India For Young Women In Science Scholarship
amount_description: INR 2.5 Lakhs for undergraduate studies in science
description: Supports young women from economically disadvantaged families to pursue higher education in scientific fields.

title: Sitaram Jindal Foundation Scholarship
description: Provides financial aid to poor and meritorious students from class 11 to postgraduate level.

title: Keep India Smiling Foundational Scholarship
description: Provides financial support to deserving and meritorious students pursuing graduation/professional courses.

title: Siemens Scholarship Program
description: Supports first-year government engineering college students from low-income families.

title: GP Birla Scholarship
description: Supports meritorious students of West Bengal pursuing further studies.

title: NSF Scholarship
description: Supports students pursuing professional courses (Engineering, Medicine, Poly) who are economically disadvantaged.

title: Rolls-Royce Unnati Scholarship
description: Supports women engineering students in their 1st, 2nd, or 3rd year.

title: Buddy4Study National Merit Scholarship
description: A merit-based scholarship open to students studying in class 1 to graduation.

title: Medhaavi Engineering Scholarship
description: Supports engineering students with high merit and lower-income background.

title: Dr. Ambedkar Post Matric Scholarship for EBC
amount_description: Covers tuition fee and maintenance allowance
description: Supports post-matric studies of Economically Backward Class (EBC) students.

title: Post Matric Scholarship for Minorities
description: Supports students from Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, and Parsi communities.
